schedule_description: Restaurant pages have a top-of-page reservation widget with date, time, and party size selectors. Click 'Find a Table' to see available slots, then select one and fill in guest details.
flow_steps: Navigate to the restaurant page on opentable.com
Set party size, date, and time in the reservation widget at the top
Select an available time slot from the results
Fill in first name, last name, email, phone on the booking form
Add special requests or occasion in the notes field
Check any required checkboxes (terms, marketing opt-out)
obstacles: Cookie consent and newsletter popups may appear — dismiss them
Some restaurants are 'OpenTable exclusive' and require an account
The 'Find a Table' button may show 'No availability' — try different times
After clicking a time slot, a new form loads — wait for it
Phone number field may have country code selector — set to +1 for US
If asked to sign in, report LOGIN_REQUIRED with the login URL
Some restaurants require prepayment — report PAYMENT_REQUIRED
